n: March on Gundabad: Resupplying the Forces

steps.t: There are empty supply crates in Shakal-atrâd, Ifbar-athrâkh, the trenches, and on the docked boat. You should deliver the supplies and replenish the …
You have distributed fresh supplies among the Gabil'akkâ. Hlóthi awaits news in Zarkul-sulûn.
